name: Altered

props.className: position-fixed top-50 start-0 w-100 d-flex justify-content-center align-items-center
position-absolute bottom-0 start-0 w-100 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center gap-1
position-absolute top-0 start-0 w-100 h-100 d-flex flex-column on-section-hovered

events.onStart: const types = ['Ocean', 'Mountain', 'Forest']; for (let i = types.length - 1; i > 0; i--) { const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1)); [types[i], types[j]] = [types[j], types[i]]; } if (game.data.Tumulte.cards) { game.data.Tumulte.cards.forEach((card, index) => { if (types[index]) card.biome = types[index]; card.flip = Math.random() < 0.5; }); }

props.className: position-fixed pe-none top-50 start-0 w-100 d-flex justify-content-center align-items-center

children.onClick: game.data.TumulteData.tokens.hero = (game.data.TumulteData.tokens.hero || 0) - (game.data.TumulteData.tokens.hero > 0 ? 1 : 0); chatLog('moved backward its hero expedition')
game.data.TumulteData.tokens.hero = (game.data.TumulteData.tokens.hero || 0) + (game.data.TumulteData.tokens.hero < 7 ? 1 : 0); chatLog('moved forward its hero expedition')
game.data.TumulteData.tokens.companion = (game.data.TumulteData.tokens.companion || 0) - (game.data.TumulteData.tokens.companion > 0 ? 1 : 0); chatLog('moved forward its companion expedition')
game.data.TumulteData.tokens.companion = (game.data.TumulteData.tokens.companion || 0) + (game.data.TumulteData.tokens.companion < 7 ? 1 : 0); chatLog('moved backward its companion expedition')

events.onUpdate: const t = game.data.TumulteData.tokens; const c = game.data.Tumulte.cards; game.data.Tumulte.tokens[game.turn.orderPosition] = t; if (t.hero === 1 || t.hero === 2 || t.companion === 1 || t.companion === 2) c[0].revealed = true; if (t.hero === 3 || t.hero === 4 || t.companion === 3 || t.companion === 4) c[1].revealed = true; if (t.hero === 5 || t.hero === 6 || t.companion === 5 || t.companion === 6) c[2].revealed = true;
events.onOpponentUpdate: const ot = opponentGame.data.TumulteData.tokens; const c = game.data.Tumulte.cards; game.data.Tumulte.tokens[opponentGame.turn.orderPosition] = ot; if (ot.hero === 1 || ot.hero === 2 || ot.companion === 1 || ot.companion === 2) c[0].revealed = true; if (ot.hero === 3 || ot.hero === 4 || ot.companion === 3 || ot.companion === 4) c[1].revealed = true; if (ot.hero === 5 || ot.hero === 6 || ot.companion === 5 || ot.companion === 6) c[2].revealed = true;

props.className: hovered-reveal position-absolute top-50 start-50 translate-middle opp-hidden

children.onClick: game.data.FirstPlayer.enabled = true; game.data.FirstPlayer.lastOwnerOrderPosition = game.turn.orderPosition; chatLog('has taken the first player token')

events.onStart: if (game.turn.isMyTurn) { game.data.FirstPlayer = { enabled: true, lastOwnerOrderPosition: game.turn.orderPosition } }
events.onOpponentUpdate: if (opponentGame.data.FirstPlayer.enabled) { game.data.FirstPlayer = { enabled: false, lastOwnerOrderPosition: opponentGame.turn.orderPosition } }
events.onNewTurn: const newFirstPlayer = (game.data.FirstPlayer.lastOwnerOrderPosition + 1) % game.turn.totalPlayers; game.data.FirstPlayer = { enabled: newFirstPlayer === game.turn.orderPosition, lastOwnerOrderPosition: newFirstPlayer }

events.onStart: const types = ['Ocean', 'Mountain', 'Forest']; for (let i = types.length - 1; i > 0; i--) { const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1)); [types[i], types[j]] = [types[j], types[i]]; } if (game.data.Tumulte.cards) { game.data.Tumulte.cards.forEach((card, index) => { if (types[index]) card.biome = types[index]; card.flip = Math.random() < 0.5; }); }

props.className: position-absolute opp-nomirror opp-mirror-x top-0 start-0 w-100 d-flex justify-content-center align-items-center

style.maskImage: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent 0%, transparent 20%, black 30%, black 100%)

props.className: position-absolute pe-none top-0 start-0 w-100 d-flex justify-content-center align-items-center

children.onClick: game.data.TumulteData.tokens.hero = (game.data.TumulteData.tokens.hero || 0) - (game.data.TumulteData.tokens.hero > 0 ? 1 : 0); chatLog('moved backward its hero expedition')
game.data.TumulteData.tokens.hero = (game.data.TumulteData.tokens.hero || 0) + (game.data.TumulteData.tokens.hero < 7 ? 1 : 0); chatLog('moved forward its hero expedition')
game.data.TumulteData.tokens.companion = (game.data.TumulteData.tokens.companion || 0) - (game.data.TumulteData.tokens.companion > 0 ? 1 : 0); chatLog('moved forward its companion expedition')
game.data.TumulteData.tokens.companion = (game.data.TumulteData.tokens.companion || 0) + (game.data.TumulteData.tokens.companion < 7 ? 1 : 0); chatLog('moved backward its companion expedition')

events.onUpdate: const t = game.data.TumulteData.tokens; const c = game.data.Tumulte.cards; game.data.Tumulte.tokens[game.turn.orderPosition] = t; if (t.hero === 1 || t.hero === 2 || t.companion === 1 || t.companion === 2) c[0].revealed = true; if (t.hero === 3 || t.hero === 4 || t.companion === 3 || t.companion === 4) c[1].revealed = true; if (t.hero === 5 || t.hero === 6 || t.companion === 5 || t.companion === 6) c[2].revealed = true;
events.onOpponentUpdate: const ot = opponentGame.data.TumulteData.tokens; const c = game.data.Tumulte.cards; game.data.Tumulte.tokens[opponentGame.turn.orderPosition] = ot; if (ot.hero === 1 || ot.hero === 2 || ot.companion === 1 || ot.companion === 2) c[0].revealed = true; if (ot.hero === 3 || ot.hero === 4 || ot.companion === 3 || ot.companion === 4) c[1].revealed = true; if (ot.hero === 5 || ot.hero === 6 || ot.companion === 5 || ot.companion === 6) c[2].revealed = true;
events.onStart: game.data.TumulteData.info = { opponentHero: game.turn.orderPosition % 2 === 0 ? ((game.turn.orderPosition + game.turn.totalPlayers + 1) % game.turn.totalPlayers) : ((game.turn.orderPosition + game.turn.totalPlayers - 1) % game.turn.totalPlayers), opponentCompanion: game.turn.orderPosition % 2 === 0 ? ((game.turn.orderPosition + game.turn.totalPlayers - 1) % game.turn.totalPlayers) : ((game.turn.orderPosition + game.turn.totalPlayers + 1) % game.turn.totalPlayers) }

props.className: position-absolute bottom-0 start-0 w-100 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center gap-1
position-absolute top-0 start-0 w-100 d-flex flex-column on-section-hovered opp-hidden

events.onOpponentUpdate: for(let i=0; i<8; i++) { if ((i < 4 && opponentGame.turn.orderPosition === game.data.TumulteData.info.opponentHero) || (i >= 4 && opponentGame.turn.orderPosition === game.data.TumulteData.info.opponentCompanion)) { game.data.OppTerrainMarkers.markers[i] = opponentGame.data.TerrainMarkers.markers[i]; } }

props.className: hovered-reveal position-absolute top-50 start-50 translate-middle opp-hidden

children.onClick: game.data.FirstPlayer.enabled = true; game.data.FirstPlayer.lastOwnerOrderPosition = game.turn.orderPosition; chatLog('has taken the first player token')

events.onStart: if (game.turn.isMyTurn) { game.data.FirstPlayer = { enabled: true, lastOwnerOrderPosition: game.turn.orderPosition } }
events.onOpponentUpdate: if (opponentGame.data.FirstPlayer.enabled) { game.data.FirstPlayer = { enabled: false, lastOwnerOrderPosition: opponentGame.turn.orderPosition } }
events.onNewTurn: const newFirstPlayer = (game.data.FirstPlayer.lastOwnerOrderPosition + 1) % game.turn.totalPlayers; game.data.FirstPlayer = { enabled: newFirstPlayer === game.turn.orderPosition, lastOwnerOrderPosition: newFirstPlayer }

customHelp:
The first player is chosen accordingly to your game options. You can take it if you want a different player to start.

Autopay only works with cards played from hand.
